steps.title: Spot the counterintuitive signal
steps.content: The phrase “counterintuitive effect” signals that the price rise produced the opposite of the usual outcome for demand.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Eliciting means drawing out or evoking, which fits the idea that the price rise stirred up new demand.
The other three either mean taking advantage of something, fulfilling a need, or imply a deliberate use, none of which capture the spontaneous increase in demand described.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
